reviews.comment:
Ya no existe esa Ypf...se demolió por un capricho del intendente de turno...una lastima, un edificio histórico y los políticos siguen haciendo lo que quieren

(Translated by Google)
That YPF station is gone now...it was demolished on a whim by the mayor at the time...a real shame, a historic building and the politicians keep doing whatever they want
